title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at GAIL India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at GAIL India
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
